metadata.description: Plugin marketplace for Claude Code and Copilot CLI agent plugins.

plugins.name: delve
plugins.description: Interactive diff review skill that walks a human reviewer through chunked, screen-sized diffs and captures TODOs for downstream agents.

plugins.name: yes-milord
plugins.description: Warcraft II Peasant sound notifications on agent lifecycle events.

plugins.name: prune
plugins.description: Interactive branch cleanup — catalog, verify, and delete stale branches with squash-merge awareness.

plugins.name: git-good
plugins.description: Safety guardrails for git operations - fixup-not-amend, surgical conflict resolution, rebase checklists, and destructive command protection.

plugins.name: vigil
plugins.description: Keep your system awake during active AI agent turns, let it sleep when idle. Cross-platform.
